instances.prompt:
Create a 6-second silent looping vertical premium website hero video. A modern iPhone is held very steadily in one hand in a luxurious medspa setting. On the phone screen is one realistic adult woman's face, centered and calm. Over the face, show a true MediaPipe / ARKit style face mesh: a dense transparent 3D wireframe mask precisely fitted to the face, made of many small landmark points connected into triangles. The mesh should look like a triangulated digital net attached to the skin, tracing the jawline, chin, eyebrows, eye outlines and eyelids, nose bridge, nostrils, nose tip, lips, mouth contour, cheeks, and facial surface. It should be hundreds of small points and thin connected triangle lines, not just a few contour curves. The mesh bends naturally with the face and remains locked to the face.

Use the website accent color for the mesh: warm maroon-brown, muted rosewood, espresso-blush, with very subtle opacity. A refined scan line moves slowly from forehead to chin once, softly revealing or brightening the triangulated mesh as it passes. The motion is minimal, calm, clinical, and luxurious. Soft natural clinic lighting, warm ivory cream background, blush and espresso palette, shallow depth of field. The phone remains the clear focal point. Realistic and polished.

Important negative instructions: no text anywhere, no captions, no labels, no letters, no numbers, no fake UI words, no logos, no brand marks, no readable interface. Do not draw makeup contour lines. Do not draw only a few curved facial outlines. Do not make decorative beauty-map lines. Do not use blue or green mesh. Do not use sci-fi hologram panels. No dashboards. No fast motion. No dramatic transitions. No split screens. No cartoon style. No distorted hands. No extra fingers. No audio. Seamless loop with a clean hold at the end.
